hero.headline: Wake Up to the Sound of Waves and Howler Monkeys
hero.subheadline: Experience the magic of sleeping under the stars near the most beautiful beaches in Costa Rica. Where the jungle meets the Pacific, your adventure begins.

welcome.title: This Is Not Just Camping. This Is Living.
welcome.paragraph1: Imagine waking up to a symphony of tropical birds while howler monkeys call from the treetops. Watching the sun slowly set as the last rays of daylight peek through the trees, roasting marshmallows over a warm fire with the people you love.
welcome.paragraph2: Welcome to Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal, where nature welcomes you with open arms and the sea becomes your nearest neighbor. Just minutes from the legendary beaches of Conchal, Puerto Viejo, Minas, and Piratas. Famous for their golden sands and unique white shells found nowhere else in the world. This corner of Guanacaste, Costa Rica, is the place where adventurers from across the globe come to breathe deep, disconnect, and remember why it's worth stepping out to explore.
welcome.paragraph3: This is reconnecting with what matters.

location.title: Feet in the Sand, Soul in the Jungle
location.text: Our campsite sits at the magical intersection where tropical dry forest meets turquoise waters. Sleep 3 minutes from the ocean, wake up surrounded by wildlife. Just you and nature's masterpiece.

wildlife.title: Your Neighbors Have Tails and Wings
wildlife.text: Howler monkeys announce the sunrise. Scarlet macaws paint the sky red. Toucans pose for your camera. This is their home you're the star guest.

experience.title: Stories You'll Tell Forever
experience.text: Stories around the grill with your loved ones, hikes through incredible forests full of natural life, where more than once you'll be amazed by how magnificent nature can be. These moments don't happen at hotels.

flexibility.title: Your Adventure, Your Way
flexibility.text: Bring your own tent or rent one of ours. Stay one night or one month. Add a sunrise kayak tour or keep it simple. We provide the paradise you write the story.

morning.title: Nature's Wake-Up Call
morning.text: The howler monkeys start their morning chorus as golden light filters through the trees. Step out of your tent into the open jungle air and the promise of adventure. Early risers spot toucans, monkeys, and parrots passing through the treetops.

midMorning.title: Beach Bliss
midMorning.text: After a fresh tropical breakfast, the turquoise waters of the nearby beaches await, just 3 minutes away. Snorkel through crystal-clear waves, spot tropical fish, or simply float in water so clear you can see your fingers. The famous shell-sand beach is your backyard.

afternoon.title: Jungle Secrets
afternoon.text: Explore hidden trails where monkeys swing overhead and iguanas sunbathe on ancient branches. Spot wildlife you've only seen in documentaries here, they're your neighbors.

evening.title: Sunset Rituals
evening.text: Grab your favorite drink and watch as the last beams of sunlight slowly disappear through the treetops, giving way to a majestic dusk. No two sunsets are alike each one is a private show just for you.

night.title: Under the Stars
night.text: Gather around the grill as the night sky reveals its greatest secrets. Share stories with fellow travelers, listen to the jungle's nighttime symphony, and wake up ready to do it all again.

bringOwn.title: For the Prepared Explorer
bringOwn.text:
Already have your trusted tent? Perfect. Set up your home away from home exactly the way you like it.

Flat, clear spaces surrounded by lush vegetation await you.
bringOwn.price: From ₡7,000.00 or $14 per night per person

rental.title: Travel Light, Sleep Right
rental.text: Flying in or prefer to pack light? We've got you covered literally. Our quality tents come ready with comfortable sleeping pads, so you can focus on the adventure and enjoy worry-free.

cozyDuo.name: Cozy Duo
cozyDuo.description: Perfect for couples or solo travelers who like space. Compact, waterproof, and surprisingly roomy.

familyExplorer.name: Family Explorer
familyExplorer.description: A medium-sized tent ideal for four people. Plenty of room to sleep comfortably, hang out, and make camping a memorable experience.

baseCamp.name: The Adventure Clan
baseCamp.description: Because the best memories are made together. A spacious tent designed for six people to sleep soundly, laugh into the night, and wake up wanting more.

amenities.title: Rustic Charm, Real Comfort
amenities.intro: Camping doesn't mean sacrificing comfort. We've thought of everything so you can focus on what matters: disconnecting from the noise and reconnecting with nature.

showers.title: Fresh Showers
showers.text: Start your day refreshed. Often with sun-heated showers.

restrooms.title: Clean Restrooms
restrooms.text: Well-maintained facilities cleaned multiple times daily

campfire.title: Kitchen & Grill Areas
campfire.text: Shared gas kitchen spaces with grills and prep stations

parking.title: Secure Parking
parking.text: Safe, monitored parking for your car or motorcycle

wifi.title: Wi-Fi Zones
wifi.text: Need to post that sunset? Connectivity when you need it, nature when you don't

cooking.title: Cooking Areas
cooking.text: Shared gas kitchen spaces with grills and prep stations

security.title: 24/7 Security
security.text: Rest easy knowing our team watches over the camp around the clock

tours.title: Tour Desk
tours.text: Book adventures, get local tips, and discover hidden gems

wildlife.title: Meet the Locals
wildlife.intro: Our camp isn't just near nature it's immersed in it. The wildlife here isn't caged or staged. These animals live here, and if you're patient and respectful, they'll share their world with you.

howler.name: Howler Monkeys
howler.text: Your natural alarm clock. These gentle giants move through the canopy at dawn and dusk, their incredible calls echoing through the forest. Spot whole families grooming and playing in the trees above camp.

macaw.name: Scarlet Macaws
macaw.text: Costa Rica's most dazzling residents. These brilliant red, yellow, and blue parrots fly in pairs over the beach at sunrise and sunset. Their calls are unmistakable and unforgettable.

toucan.name: Keel-Billed Toucans
toucan.text: The rainbow-beaked icons of the tropics. Watch them hop between branches searching for fruit, their oversized bills making them impossible to miss.

capuchin.name: White-Faced Capuchins
capuchin.text: The curious ones. These intelligent monkeys might investigate your campsite from a safe distance, their expressive faces showing endless curiosity about their human visitors.

iguana.name: Iguanas & More
iguana.text: Green iguanas sunbathing on branches, Jesus Christ lizards running across water, coatimundis foraging in groups every walk reveals new neighbors.

wildlife.note: Important: We practice responsible wildlife interaction. Please don't feed the animals they thrive best on their natural diet, and your respect helps keep them wild.

testimonials.title: Stories From the Sand
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from adventurers who found their paradise with us

location.title: Where Jungle Meets Ocean
location.intro: Located in the heart of Guanacaste, Costa Rica's stunning Gold Coast, Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal sits in the sweet spot between adventure and accessibility.

distances.volcano: 45 min to Rincón de la Vieja

location.gettingHere: Fly into Daniel Oduber Quirós International Airport (LIR) in Liberia. Rent a car for maximum freedom to explore, or arrange a shuttle pickup directly to camp. The drive is beautiful your adventure starts the moment you land.

cta.title: Your Spot Under the Stars Is Waiting
cta.text: Every sunset is different. Every night sky tells a new story. Every day brings unexpected wildlife encounters. But campsites are limited, and the best spots go fast especially during dry season (December-April).
cta.subtext: Don't just dream about it. Don't just add it to your bucket list. Make it real.

safety.q: Is it safe to camp in Costa Rica?
safety.a: Absolutely! Costa Rica is one of the safest countries in Central America. Our camp has 24/7 security, and the local community is welcoming and friendly. Solo travelers, families, and groups all feel at home here.

packing.a: Essentials: sunscreen, insect repellent, flashlight, water bottle, and adventure spirit. Nice to have: binoculars for wildlife, waterproof bag for beach days, light layers for cooler evenings. If you're renting a tent, we provide sleeping pads just bring your own sleeping bag or rent bedding from us.

weather.a: Guanacaste has two seasons: dry (December-April) with sunny days and cool nights, and green (May-November) with afternoon showers and lush landscapes. Both are magical dry season for guaranteed sun, green season for fewer crowds and dramatic skies.

wildlifeSightings.q: Can I see wildlife for sure?
wildlifeSightings.a: While wildlife is wild (no guarantees in nature!), our location means sightings are extremely common. Howler monkeys are heard daily, birds are constant, and most guests see multiple species during their stay. Early mornings and late afternoons are prime time.

families.q: Is this good for families with kids?
families.a: Kids LOVE it here! The beach is calm for swimming, the wildlife is endlessly fascinating, and there's space to run and explore. We've hosted families with babies to teenagers all leave with incredible memories.

rain.a: Our tents are waterproof, and we have covered common areas. A tropical rain shower is part of the experience usually short, followed by the freshest air you've ever breathed. Pack a light jacket and embrace it!

booking.a: Easy! Use our online booking system right here. Select your dates, tell us how many people are coming, choose your accommodation, add extras, pay 50% of your booking, and done! You'll receive instant confirmation. You pay the other 50% when you arrive at the campsite. We can't wait to see you!

newsletter.title: Join the Tribe
newsletter.text: Get travel tips, wildlife updates, and exclusive offers.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: At Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and what your rights are.

dataController.title: 1. Data Controller
dataController.content: The data controller responsible for processing your personal data is Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal, located in Puerto Viejo de Conchal, Guanacaste, Costa Rica. For any privacy-related inquiries, you can contact us at: jj111w559@gmail.com

dataCollected.title: 2. Data We Collect
dataCollected.content: We collect the following personal data when you make a reservation or contact us:
list: Full name
Email address
Phone number (with country code)
Country of residence
Estimated arrival time
Special requests or dietary restrictions
Special celebration information (optional)
Payment receipt (image or PDF)

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
purpose.content: We use your personal data for the following purposes:
list: Processing and managing your accommodation reservation
Sending confirmations and communications related to your stay
Responding to your inquiries and support requests
Improving our services and user experience
Complying with legal and fiscal obligations
Sending marketing communications if you have given your consent (you can unsubscribe at any time)

dataStorage.title: 4. Data Storage and Security
dataStorage.content: Your data is securely stored on Supabase servers, which comply with international security standards (SOC 2 Type II). We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure. All data transmission is performed using 256-bit SSL encryption.

thirdParties.title: 5. Sharing Data with Third Parties
thirdParties.content: We do not sell or rent your personal data to third parties. We may share your information only with:
list: Payment service providers (to process transactions securely)
Email service providers (to send confirmations and communications)
Competent authorities when required by law

cookies.title: 6. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We currently use essential cookies for website functionality (such as language preferences). We plan to implement analytics tools such as Google Analytics and Facebook Pixel in the near future to improve our services. When this occurs, we will update this policy and add a cookie consent banner. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect site functionality.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: In accordance with applicable data protection legislation, you have the following rights:
list: Right of access: know what personal data we hold about you
Right of rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data
Right of erasure: request the deletion of your data
Right to object: object to the processing of your data
Right of portability: receive your data in a structured format
Right to withdraw consent at any time
rights.contact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us at: jj111w559@gmail.com

dataRetention.title: 8. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain your personal data for the time necessary for the purposes described in this policy. Reservation data is retained for 5 years for fiscal and legal reasons. Marketing data is retained until you withdraw your consent.

children.title: 9. Minors
children.content: Our services are not directed at minors under 18 years of age without the consent of their parents or guardians. We do not knowingly collect personal data from minors. If you believe we have collected data from a minor, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on this page with a revised update date. We recommend reviewing this policy regularly.

contact.title: 11. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions, concerns, or requests related to this Privacy Policy or the processing of your personal data, you can contact us through:
contact.address: Address: Puerto Viejo de Conchal, Guanacaste, Costa Rica

termsAndConditions.title: Terms and Conditions
termsAndConditions.intro: By making a reservation at Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal, you (the guest) agree to these Terms and Conditions governing the use of our services and the conditions of your stay.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction and Parties
introduction.content: This agreement is established between Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal (hereinafter, 'the Campground') and the person making the reservation (hereinafter, 'the Guest'). By completing the online booking process and checking the acceptance box, the Guest declares having read, understood, and fully accepted these Terms and Conditions.

services.title: 2. Services Offered
services.content: Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal offers a safe outdoor space for guests to enjoy nature:
list: Open-air space for guests to set up their own camping equipment
Campers must bring their own tent, camping gear, and personal equipment
Complementary services: showers, restrooms, cooking areas, parking, and Wi-Fi zones
Optional activities and tours available at the time of booking
All reservations are subject to availability

payment.title: 3. Payment Process
payment.content: Accepted payment methods are SINPE Móvil and cash. The payment process works as follows:
list: A 50% deposit of the total amount is required at the time of booking as confirmation
The remaining 50% is paid directly at the campground upon check-in
The reservation is confirmed only after verification of the payment receipt
The guest must upload the payment receipt on the platform during the booking process
The receipt must clearly show the amount transferred, the date, and the destination number

cancellation.title: 4. Cancellation and Refund Policy
cancellation.content: The Campground offers a flexible cancellation policy to protect the guest:
list: The guest is entitled to a full 100% refund in case of cancellation, regardless of how far in advance it is made
To request cancellation, the guest must access the platform and enter their booking code in the 'Cancel Reservation' section
Once the cancellation is processed, the refund will be handled through the same payment method used
The Campground reserves the right to cancel reservations in cases of force majeure, notifying the guest as early as possible and offering a full refund

rules.title: 5. House Rules and Restrictions
rules.content: To ensure a safe and enjoyable experience for all guests, the following rules apply:
list: The consumption of alcohol and drugs is strictly prohibited within the campground premises
Respect must be maintained toward other guests, staff, and local wildlife
Quiet hours: from 10:00 PM to 7:00 AM
Fires are not permitted outside designated areas
Guests are responsible for keeping common areas clean
Violation of these rules may result in immediate expulsion without the right to a refund

liability.title: 6. Liability
liability.content: Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal establishes the following conditions regarding liability:
list: The Campground is not responsible for personal items lost, stolen, or damaged during the stay
The guest uses all facilities at their own risk
The Campground is not liable for accidents or injuries except in cases of direct staff negligence
It is recommended to purchase travel insurance covering outdoor activities
The Campground does not guarantee sightings of specific wildlife, as these are animals in their natural habitat

modifications.title: 7. Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal reserves the right to update or modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will take effect upon publication on this page. Reservations made prior to a modification will be governed by the terms in effect at the time of booking.

jurisdiction.title: 8. Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.content: This agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of Costa Rica. For any dispute arising from these Terms and Conditions, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Costa Rica. Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal is located in Puerto Viejo de Conchal, Guanacaste, Costa Rica.

cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellationPolicy.intro: This Cancellation Policy applies to all reservations made through the Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal platform. By completing a reservation, the guest accepts the terms described herein.

guestCancellation.title: 1. Guest Right to Cancel
guestCancellation.content: The guest has the full right to cancel their reservation at any time, regardless of how far in advance it is requested. No fees or penalties apply.
list: Cancellation can be made at any time before check-in
No fees or penalties are applied for cancellation
The cancellation request must be submitted through the web platform using the reservation code

refundPolicy.title: 2. Refund Policy
refundPolicy.content: The guest is entitled to a full refund of the deposit amount paid.
list: The refund corresponds to 100% of the amount paid
The refund is processed immediately once the cancellation request is approved
Refunds are issued exclusively via SINPE Móvil, to the same phone number used for the original payment
Processing time depends on banking procedures and may take up to 3 business days

campingCancellation.title: 3. Cancellation by the Campground
campingCancellation.content: In exceptional circumstances beyond the control of Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal, the campground reserves the right to cancel confirmed reservations.
list: Circumstances that may lead to cancellation: force majeure, extreme weather conditions, health emergencies, or other circumstances beyond the campground's control
In all cases, the guest will receive a full 100% refund of the amount paid
The campground will notify the guest as soon as possible through the contact details registered on the platform (email and/or phone)

process.title: 4. Step-by-Step Cancellation Process
process.content: To cancel a reservation, follow these steps:
list: Visit the Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal web platform
Access your active reservation using your reference code
Select the «Cancel Reservation» option
Confirm the cancellation request
You will receive a confirmation and the refund will be processed and sent within a maximum of 3 business days

modifications.title: 5. Modifications to This Policy
modifications.content: Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal reserves the right to update or modify this Cancellation Policy at any time. Changes will apply only to reservations made after the update date. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.

jurisdiction.title: 6. Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.content: This policy is governed by the laws of the Republic of Costa Rica. For any dispute arising from this policy, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Costa Rica. Camping Puerto Viejo Conchal is located in Puerto Viejo de Conchal, Guanacaste, Costa Rica.
